titleStmt.title: SII 10.338: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu

No. 338. (A.R. No. 195 of 1905.) ON THE BASE OF THE SOUTH WALL OF THE KITCHEN-VANṬAMIDDI-IN FRONT OF THE MAṆḌAPA IN THE TEMPLE OF TRIPURĀNTAKĒŚVARA, TRIPURANTAKAM, KURNOOL DISTRICT. Ś. 1174 (54th year of Gaṇapatidēva) (Parīdhāvi)

summary.p: Incomplete. Mentions Kākati Gaṇapatidēva with his titles and also refers to an unnamed pontiff of the Gōḷagī-maṭha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīsamastavidyāvilāsinīlāsakarasikasakalanidhivēlāmēkhalāvalayitavasumatīvalayavijaya mālākalitabhujaśikharōttaṁsa sahasrāṁśuvaṁśāvataṁsa samarasamasamayasamāhanyamāna nissāṇaghōṣāsamākarṇanavisarppat bāṣpadhārādhautapratibhaṭabhaṭīgaṁḍa ccalamartu kaṁḍa praṇatasakalanarapatimaṇimakuṭakōṭimakarikā
cuṁbyamānacaraṇasakhakiraṇakaṁddala mūrurāya jagaddhaḷa karakalitakaravāḷakṣapitivipakṣa vilā sinīvilaṁbamānāḷakavallarīvinissāritalalāṭataṭakastūrikātilaka kākatikulatilaka Aribalajala nidhimadhanaśūra bhujastaṁbhaparākramāpahasitamaṁddara jagadēkasuṁdara Anumakoṁḍapuravarā dhīśvara pratāpalaṁkēśvara paramamāhēśvara śrīsvayaṁ
bhudēvadivyaśrīpādapadmārādhaka parabalasādhaka vibhavavinirjita vibudharājulu [Ai]na svasti śrī matu gaṇapatidēvamaharājulu tamadivyarājyasaṁvatsaramulu 54 Agu srahi śaka varṣaṁbulu 1174 Agu nēṁṭi parīdhāvi saṁvatsara vaiśākha śu 2 śukra nāṁḍu svasti śrīsamastajanānukaṁpāsaṁpalaṁpaṭakaṭākṣavikṣēpamātrapraśamitatāpatrayalōkatrayapra sṛmaranija
kīrtticaṁdrikānukāraprabhūtabhūtibhūṣaṇabhāsurasarvvāṁga sāṣṭāṁga samadhigataduradhi gama nigamavacanaprāgaligabhīra śīlaśīlitāśēṣa śivasaṁhitābhihitakriyākāṁḍa krama prakramadūrasamutsāritasaṁśritajanaduritaprasaṁga tribhuvanaviditatriḷakṣagrāmagōḷagīmaṭha mahācāryyasāmrājya paṭṭabaddha bhaktyudrēkapraṇāmaniśśēṣaviśvaṁbharādhīśvaramakuṭa taṭaghaṭitama
ṇigaṇakiraṇarājinīrājitacaraṇarājīva svabhāvamahānubhāvacāritra pavitrīkṛtagāyatrigōtra (left Incomplete)
Digital edition of SII 10.338 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
